Appearances:
Plaintiff Pontar real Estate Management Company is present. Represented by Mary Pontar.
Attorney Jonathan Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Manuel Alvarado is present.
Attorney Tina McDaniel representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of DEC-27-2011 remains on calendar.
